name: Talked to insurance adjuster after work slip, did I mess up?
description: Likely; lawyer takes over communications now.

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after work slip, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Likely; lawyer takes over communications now.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly; they twist words to deny.** Stop talking, get lawyer.[1] Key factors: Recorded calls used against you. Don't admit fault or downplay injury. Lawyer handles all contact. Salvage by clarifying in writing. Most regret solo talks.
